lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਚਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਕਹੈ ਕਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur vich amrit naam hai amrit kahai kahaae |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is within the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ਤਤੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: amrit baanee tat hai guramukh vasai man aae |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Word of His Bani is the true essence. It comes to abide in the mind of the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੋੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee naam niramalo niramal naam dhiaae |
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, one meditates on the Immaculate Naam, the Pure and Holy Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਕਮਲੁ ਪਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai kamal paragaasiaa jotee jot milaae |
lines.english: The heart-lotus blossoms forth, and one's light merges in the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਮੇਲਿਓਨੁ ਜਿਨ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਲਿਖਾਇ ॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur tin kau melion jin dhur masatak bhaag likhaae |25|
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone meet with the True Guru, who have such pre-ordained destiny inscribed upon their foreheads. ||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹੁ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਸਭੁ ਕੂੜੁ ਹੈ ਕੂੜਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਲਪਟਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mohu kuttanb sabh koorr hai koorr rahiaa lapattaae |
lines.english: Emotional attachments to relatives are totally false; they remain engrossed in falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਤਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਿ ਹੈ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭੁਖ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: andar tisanaa ag hai manamukh bhukh na jaae |
lines.english: Within the self-willed manmukhs is the fire of desire; their hunger does not depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਚਿੰਤਵੈ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਬਧਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin chintaa chintavai chintaa badhaa jaae |
lines.english: Night and day, they are troubled by anxiety; bound to anxiety, they depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਚੁਕਈ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaman maran na chukee haumai karam kamaae |
lines.english: Their comings and goings in reincarnation never end; they do their deeds in egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਉਬਰੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਇ ॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: gur saranaaee ubarai naanak le chhaddaae |26|
lines.english: But in the Guru's Sanctuary, they are saved, O Nanak, and set free. ||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਦਾ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh har dhiaaeidaa satasangat satigur bhaae |
lines.english: The True Guru meditates on the Lord, the Primal Being. The Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, loves the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਦੇ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat satigur sevade har mele gur melaae |
lines.english: Those who join the Sat Sangat, and serve the True Guru - the Guru unites them in the Lord's Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਬੋਹਿਥੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਤਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ehu bhaujal jagat sansaar hai gur bohith naam taraae |
lines.english: This world, this universe, is a terrifying ocean. On the Boat of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the Guru carries us across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਿਖਾਂ ਕੀ ਹਰਿ ਧੂੜਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਹਮ ਪਾਪੀ ਭੀ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਂਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: gurasikhaan kee har dhoorr dehi ham paapee bhee gat paanhi |
lines.english: O Lord, please bless me with the dust of the feet of the Guru's Sikhs. I am a sinner - please save me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਿਖੀ ਭਾਣਾ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਰਿ ਲੰਘਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gurasikhee bhaanaa maniaa gur pooraa paar langhaae |
lines.english: The Sikhs of the Guru accept and obey the Lord's Will; the Perfect Guru carries them across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhur masatak har prabh likhiaa gur naanak miliaa aae |
lines.english: Those who have such pre-ordained destiny written upon their foreheads by the Lord God, come to meet Guru Nanak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕੰਕਰ ਮਾਰਿ ਬਿਦਾਰਿਅਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jamakankar maar bidaarian har daragah le chhaddaae |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death is beaten and driven away; we are saved in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਿਖਾ ਨੋ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਤੁਠਾ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: gurasikhaa no saabaas hai har tutthaa mel milaae |27|
lines.english: Blessed and celebrated are the Sikhs of the Guru; in His Pleasure, the Lord unites them in His Union. ||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਗਾਇ ਕਰਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਮਗੁ ਦੇਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam har keerat gaae kar chaanan mag dekhaaeaa |
lines.english: Singing the Kirtan of the Praises of the Lord's Name, the Lord's path is illuminated and shown to His Sikhs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦਿੜਾਇਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai har naam dirraaeaa jin vichahu bharam chukaaeaa |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has implanted the Lord's Name within me; it has dispelled my doubts from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਏਕ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar ek liv laagee antar naam vasaaeaa |
lines.english: Conquering my egotism, I remain lovingly attuned to the One Lord; the Naam, the Name of the Lord, dwells within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਕਰਤਾ ਜੋ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਨਾਇ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh aape aap varatai karataa jo bhaavai so naae laaeaa |
lines.english: The Creator Himself is All-pervading; as He pleases, He links us to His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਜਮੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਇ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee jam johi na sakai sachai naae samaaeaa |
lines.english: I follow the Guru's Teachings, and so the Messenger of Death cannot even see me; I am immersed in the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭੂਲੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਸਾਕਤ ਦੁਰਜਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: man antar haumai rog bhram bhoole haumai saakat durajanaa |
lines.english: Within the minds of the faithless cynics is the disease of egotism; these evil people wander around lost, deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਨਾਉ ਲਏ ਤਾਂ ਜੀਵੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਖਿਨੁ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਇਆ ॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: jan naanak naau le taan jeevai bin naavai khin mar jaaeaa |28|
lines.english: Servant Nanak lives, chanting the Name. Without the Name, he dies in an instant. ||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰੋਗੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਾਧੂ ਸਜਣਾ ॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: naanak rog gavaae mil satigur saadhoo sajanaa |29|
lines.english: O Nanak, this disease is eradicated only by meeting with the True Guru, the Holy Friend. ||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਕਸਾਈ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਚੋਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: har prem kasaaee dinas raat har ratee har rang chole |
lines.english: Attracted by the Lord's Love, day and night, the body-robe is imbued with the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee har har bole |
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੈਸਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨ ਲਭਈ ਸਭੁ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਜਗਤੁ ਮੈ ਟੋਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: har jaisaa purakh na labhee sabh dekhiaa jagat mai ttole |
lines.english: I have not found any being like the Lord, although I have searched and looked all over the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦਿੜਾਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਅਨਤ ਨ ਕਾਹੂ ਡੋਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur satigur naam dirraaeaa man anat na kaahoo ddole |
lines.english: The Guru, the True Guru, has implanted the Naam within; now, my mind does not waver or wander anywhere else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਦਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਗੁਲ ਗੋਲੇ ॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har kaa daas hai gur satigur ke gul gole |30|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is the slave of the Lord, the slave of the slaves of the Guru, the True Guru. ||30||
